response.original_title: +1-(850)-600-1393 I forgot my Onchain account password. How can I reset it?
response.overview: If you need assistance, you can contact ☎️ +1-(850).600.1393 our Onchain wallet customer support team through phone, email, live chat, or the support section on our website/app. Provide your account details and a clear description of your issue so the team ☎️ +1-(850).600.1393 can help you more quickly. Generally, non-custodial on-chain wallets cannot be reset with a simple "Forgot Password" link. Instead, you will need to restore the wallet using the 12- to 24-word recovery phrase (seed phrase) you were given when you first created the wallet.
response.title: +1-(850)-600-1393 I forgot my Onchain account password. How can I reset it?
